constraints.heading: Travel constraints
constraints.allowedDaysHint: Leave all unchecked to allow any day of the week.
constraints.planningHorizonDaysHint: Suggestions are generated only within this horizon (1 to 365 days).
constraints.considerPublicHolidaysHint: Public holidays will not count as allowed travel days.
constraints.considerVacationDaysHint: Personal leave days will not count as allowed travel days.
constraints.publicHolidayRegionsHint: Select the regions whose public holidays should be displayed in your calendar.
constraints.icsImportHint: Import public holidays from a local ICS calendar file. This replaces any previously imported holidays.
constraints.icsImportError: An error occurred while importing the ICS file. Please try again.
constraints.schoolHolidayZonesHint: Select the school zones whose holiday periods should be displayed in your calendar.
constraints.schoolIcsImportHint: Import school holidays from a local ICS calendar file. This replaces any previously imported school holidays.
constraints.schoolIcsImportError: An error occurred while importing the ICS file. Please try again.
constraints.flexibleHint: Constraints are guidelines; derogations are allowed.
constraints.strictHint: Constraints are mandatory; trips outside the allowed slots cannot be created.
constraints.saveSuccess: Your travel constraints have been saved.
constraints.saveError: An error occurred while saving the constraints. Please try again.
